meta.title: Essentia | Longevity Center & Social Wellness Club
meta.description: Essentia is a longevity center and social wellness club in Tenerife, combining regenerative medicine, wellness protocols, and an exclusive community.

hero.headline: For those who
hero.subheadline: Longevity Center & Social Wellness Club in Tenerife

brandStatement.headline: A longer life should also be a better one.
brandStatement.body: Essentia brings together regenerative medicine, longevity protocols, and an exclusive community in one intentional space, rooted in Tenerife, designed for those who understand that how you live matters as much as how long.

servicesOverview.sectionSubheadline: Science, body, and community: working as one.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Thermal contrast, manual therapies, breathwork, and red light — a full spectrum of restoration.

medicine.title: Medicine
medicine.description: Regenerative protocols, IV therapy, and hyperbaric oxygen — clinical science and precision care in service of longevity.

community.title: Community
community.description: Running club, education programs, and exclusive memberships — true belonging to something meaningful.

membershipTeaser.headline: Choose your
membershipTeaser.subheadline: Every tier includes full access to the Essentia space: what changes is depth, priority, and belonging.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Full access to all wellness facilities, group sessions, and community events.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: All Essential benefits plus priority booking, personalized protocols, and medical consultations.

founder.name: Founder
founder.description: Full ecosystem access with a dedicated health advisor, unlimited guest privileges, and founding member status.

0.quote: Essentia changed how I think about time. Not just living longer — living better, right now.
0.name: Marcus V.

1.quote: The combination of medical protocols and the community here is unlike anything I've experienced.
1.name: Claudia R.

2.quote: I came for the therapies. I stayed for the people. The running club has transformed my relationship with movement.
2.name: James H.

3.quote: The hyperbaric sessions combined with personalized protocols have made a measurable difference in my recovery.
3.name: Dr. Sofia M.

4.quote: Coming here twice a week has become non-negotiable. It's where I reset and come back sharper.
4.name: Elena K.

5.quote: The IV protocols and cold exposure have genuinely shifted my energy levels. Science-backed and results-driven.
5.name: Thomas B.

6.quote: I never expected to find a real community in a wellness club. The people here are extraordinary.
6.name: Natalie W.

7.quote: As a physician, I'm selective about longevity claims. Essentia delivers evidence-based care with real integrity.
7.name: Dr. Rafael A.

8.quote: The space itself inspires. Every detail — the light, the materials, the quiet — tells you this place is serious.
8.name: Isabelle D.

9.quote: Red light therapy and contrast bathing have become my weekly anchor. My recovery has never been this consistent.
9.name: Oliver P.

10.quote: Founding membership was the best investment I've made in myself. The access and the advisor relationship are unmatched.
10.name: Caroline F.

11.quote: I've been to wellness clubs across Europe. Nothing compares to what Essentia has built in Tenerife.
11.name: Marco L.

theSpace.headline: Built for those who invest in themselves.
theSpace.body: Perched on the cliffs of Costa Adeje in Tenerife, Essentia is a place where architecture, light, and purpose align, designed to slow you down in all the right ways.

runningClub.headline: Every Saturday morning, 7:30am
runningClub.description: Curated routes through Costa Adeje, all levels welcome.

educationPrograms.headline: Longevity Masterclass Series
educationPrograms.description: Monthly deep-dives with leading researchers, clinicians, and practitioners, open to all members.

events.headline: Member Gatherings
events.description: Private dinners, wellness retreats, and seasonal celebrations: moments that make the club feel like home.
